title: A Conserved Fibroblast-Myeloid Gene Signature in Digestive Cancers: Multi-Omics Integration Identifies,,, andas Candidate Microenvironmental Markers.
snippet: Digestive cancers exhibit high heterogeneity and poor prognosis, yet whether their tumor microenvironments share conserved stromal-immune interactions remains unclear. Here, we performed an integrative multi-omics analysis across seven digestive cancer types and identified a conserved four-gene signature-,,, and-that is consistently enriched in matrix cance...

title: Targeted Therapies for Each Subtype of Breast Cancer.
snippet: Breast cancer (BC) is a clinically heterogeneous malignancy and a leading cause of cancer-related mortality in women worldwide. It is classified into hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-positive, and triple-negative (TNBC) subtypes based on molecular biomarkers. This heterogeneity drives distinct disease progressi...
